original_title: DKTM-018 When I went home for the first time in a long time, the appearance of my parents and my brother and wife living together in a two-family house is a little strange ... Natsuko Kayama
overview: I started living alone as I entered university. There were various things, but when I went home for a change, I felt something was wrong with my parents'house after a long absence. After a few days, I see a suspicious sight. My mother and brother, my father and sister-in-law were having sex with each other! !!
